'''Tamaab Moolis''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] researcher that escaped the [[Battle of Ithor|destruction]] of his [[Planet/Legends|homeworld]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], he was the Director of the [[Institute for Sentient Studies]].

{{Char-stub}}
